input_dict.question: NFL Street 3 is the third installment of the "NFL Street" series, which  American football wide receiver, was an official spokesperson of the game?
input_dict.target_summary: Summary1 candidate: "Chad Johnson" was proposed as the game's spokesperson. Second-hop evidence confirms two relevant facts: (1) Chad Javon Johnson (formerly Chad Ochocinco) is a former American football wide receiver. (2) The NFL Street 3 page states: "Chad Johnson of the Cincinnati Bengals appears on the cover and was the official spokesperson of the game." These integrated facts preserve the necessary evidence for the final-answer agent to determine which American football wide receiver served as the game's official spokesperson.
input_dict.candidate_summary: Chad Johnson was the official spokesperson of NFL Street 3. The game passage says he appears on the cover and was the official spokesperson (NFL Street 3), and the biography calls him a "former American football wide receiver" (Chad Johnson). Chad Johnson (formerly Chad Ochocinco) is therefore identified by the passages as the former American football wide receiver who served as NFL Street 3's official spokesperson.
